common.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

register.title: Create your account
register.termsNotice: By signing up, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

individual.title: Worker Onboarding
individual.description: Set up your profile so you can get paid compliantly anywhere in the world.

business.title: Employer Onboarding
business.description: Set up your organization to hire and pay your global team.

welcome.title: Welcome to the platform
welcome.description: Let's get you set up to receive payments globally. This takes about 10 minutes.

personal_info.title: Your personal details
personal_info.description: Tell us a bit about yourself. This information is used for your contracts and tax forms.

country_select.title: Where are you based?
country_select.description: Your country of residence determines your contract template, tax forms, and payment options.

entity_type.title: How will you work?
entity_type.description: Select whether you will work as an individual or through a registered company.

company_details.title: Your company details
company_details.description: Provide your registered company information for contracts and invoicing.

contract_type.title: Choose your contract type
contract_type.description: Select how you prefer to structure your work and payments.

withdrawal_method.title: How would you like to be paid?
withdrawal_method.description: Choose your preferred withdrawal method. You can change this later.

tax_info.title: Tax information
tax_info.description: Your tax details help us generate the correct withholding forms.

gdpr_consent.title: Data privacy preferences
gdpr_consent.description: As an EU resident, we need your consent to process certain data.

document_upload.title: Upload your identity documents
document_upload.description: A government-issued ID is required to verify your identity and unlock withdrawals.

kyc_verification.title: Identity verification
kyc_verification.description: We'll verify your identity automatically. This usually takes just a few minutes.

review.title: Review your information
review.description: Check that everything is correct before you submit.

complete.title: You're all set!
complete.description: Welcome to the platform. Your account is ready to use.

biz_welcome.title: Welcome to GlobalHR
biz_welcome.description: Let's set up your organization so you can hire and pay your global team compliantly.

biz_complete.title: Your organization is ready!
biz_complete.description: You can now start onboarding your team members and running payroll.

company_info.title: Tell us about your company
company_info.description: This information will appear on employment contracts and official documents.

hq_country.title: Where is your company headquartered?
hq_country.description: Your HQ country determines billing currency and legal entity for employer agreements.

hiring_intent.title: What would you like to do?
hiring_intent.description: Choose the primary way you want to hire and pay your global team.

eor_worker_country.title: Where will you hire your first employee?
eor_worker_country.description: We'll prepare an employment quote for that country.

eor_quote.title: Your employment quote
eor_quote.description: Here's a cost breakdown for employing someone in the selected country.

contractor_details.title: Contractor details
contractor_details.description: Tell us about the contractor you want to work with.

gp_entity_confirm.title: Confirm your local entity
gp_entity_confirm.description: Global Payroll requires you to have a registered legal entity in the payroll country.

peo_state_select.title: Select employee state
peo_state_select.description: We support US employees in all 50 states.

billing_setup.title: Set up billing
billing_setup.description: Choose how you'll pay for our services.

admin_info.title: Account administrator
admin_info.description: Confirm the details of the primary admin for this account.

gdprConsent.label: I consent to the processing of my personal data as described in the Privacy Policy.

marketingConsent.label: I'd like to receive product updates and news.

governmentId.label: Government-issued ID (passport, national ID, or driver's license)

proofOfAddress.label: Proof of address (optional — utility bill, bank statement)

hiringIntent.label: What do you want to do?

options.global_payroll: Run payroll for employees in countries where I have entities

hasLocalEntity.label: Do you have a registered legal entity in that country?

kyc.provider: Powered by our identity verification partner

errors.emailInUse: This email address is already registered.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.uploadFailed: File upload failed. Please try again.
errors.kycFailed: Identity verification failed. Please check your documents and try again.
errors.stepNotFound: Step not found. Please restart onboarding.
